title: Febreze Plug-in Air Freshener Refills, Vanilla & Magnolia Spring Edition, 20ml, Pack of 3

features: LONG-LASTING FRAGRANCE: Each 20ml refill provides up to 90 days of continuous vanilla and magnolia scent when used as directed
SPRING EDITION: Special seasonal collection featuring a harmonious blend of sweet vanilla and delicate magnolia flower notes
CONVENIENT PACK: Set includes three refills that are compatible with all Febreze plug-in warmers for extended freshening
ADJUSTABLE INTENSITY: Built-in adjustable settings allow you to customise the scent strength to suit your preference
EASY TO USE: Simply insert the refill into a compatible plug-in warmer until you hear it click into place
description: Product description Transform your living space with these premium plug-in air freshener refills in a delightful Vanilla & Magnolia fragrance. This Spring Edition pack includes three 20ml refills, perfect for continuous freshness throughout your home. The sophisticated blend combines sweet vanilla notes with the elegant floral scent of magnolia, creating a welcoming atmosphere that lasts up to 90 days. These refills are designed to work seamlessly with compatible plug-in devices, offering consistent fragrance delivery that helps eliminate unwanted odours. The convenient 20ml size provides long-lasting performance, while the special spring-inspired packaging features beautiful golden floral designs. Simply insert into your compatible plug-in device and adjust the intensity to suit your preference. Ideal for use in living rooms, bedrooms, hallways, or any space where you want to maintain a pleasant atmosphere. Keep your home feeling fresh and inviting with these premium fragrance refills. Ingredients Citronellol

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Home Fragrance, Indoor Air Freshening, Room
